occupation: Corporate Sales Manager at Politis Group
headline: Corporate Sales Manager at Politis Group of Companies GREECE / CYPRUS & Co-Founder at Los Adgeles
summary:
WORK EXPERIENCE
09/2020 - Present
Politis Group – Athens
OOH MEDIA - Sfera 102,2 - Music 89,2 - Pride 98,6 - Streamee
Corporate Sales Manager

01/2012 – 08/2020
Politis Group – Athens
Key Account Director
Sales and advertising consultant for OOH campaigns (Outdoor media-Transit media, radio Campaigns (Sfera 102.2/Mousikos98.6 Fm) and Barter Agreements

Executive Sales Director at HP Global Advertising for the following deal sites:
yellowday.gr, regroup.gr, happydeals.gr, deals365.gr 2012-2017

Responsibilities: Run & support sales strategy, forecast and develop monthly sales quotas
for group’s advertising media (radio, outdoor, internet), analyze & monitor competition and
trends, train & coordinate different sales teams, establish sales objectives for each media.

08/2009–06/2011
Thema Fm (98.9) - Radio 9 - Channel 9 - Athens
Marketing - Commercial Department-sales director
Responsibilities: Sales of advertising space in both Radio and TV.

08/1999 – 08/2009
Alpha - Skai - Alter Channel - Athens
Production Manager of the TV shows “Jungle” and “Yellow Press”.
Key member of the editorial team for both TV shows as well as for the portal www.zougla.gr
Responsibilities for the TV shows: Budget-Cost estimate, Sets, Head of ENG (employee’s shifts), Video Post Production, Head of Link, Flow Manager (Floor Manager of both the host and the guests), Manager (Expenses - Income - Contracts), Organization & Production Journalists Delegation, Head of Supplies.
Responsibilities for the portal: Columnist at Lifestyle section, responsible for the live links of the portal, Producer of the weekly broadcast “Hourly Interviews with Famous people”, responsible for capturing and the creation of the column «Travel». This column consisted of the best travel destinations which were advertised through video, yielding large sums of money. (Business Research, Script, Editing Video,
Financial Agreements). In addition, I contributed in the sales of advertising space on the open market.
